security.csp: default-src 'self' customprotocol: asset: data: blob: https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://i.ytimg.com https://img.youtube.com; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob: https://i.ytimg.com https://img.youtube.com; media-src 'self' asset: data: blob:; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.youtube.com https://i.ytimg.com https://img.youtube.com

bundle.longDescription: ICE Canvas is a personal canvas organizer for .icv files (also opens .canvas).
